犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤CT影像特徵

📅 2019Journal of Small Animal Practice🐾 [dog]📡 CT🔗 DOIJania R et al.

📋 基本摘要

研究目的

本研究旨在描述犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤的 CT 影像特徵，特別是比較並確認人類醫學中已知的軟骨基質礦化型態（環弧型、爆米花型鈣化）是否同樣出現於犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤，並評估這些特徵是否有助於縮窄破壞性鼻腔腫塊的鑑別診斷範圍。

英文原文｜The purpose of this study is to describe CT imaging features of confirmed nasal chondrosarcoma in a series of dogs and identify calcification patterns potentially suggestive of nasal chondrosarcoma.

研究設計

回溯性病例系列研究。路易斯安那州立大學獸醫教學醫院，2005 年 1 月至 2016 年 8 月。收錄條件：接受顯影前 + 顯影後頭部 CT 且具鼻腔軟骨肉瘤組織病理確診之犬隻。共 11 例符合標準。

英文原文｜This retrospective study included dogs that presented for evaluation of nasal disease to a university veterinary teaching hospital from January 2005 to August 2016. Animals were included if they underwent a precontrast and postcontrast CT examination of the head and had a histologic diagnosis of nasal chondrosarcoma.

主要結果

8/11（73%）的鼻腔軟骨肉瘤出現鈣化，其中 6/11（55%）為爆米花型，2/11（18%）為環弧型。此為犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤中首次描述環弧型及爆米花型鈣化，與人類軟骨肉瘤的 CT 特徵一致。

英文原文｜Major findings are consistent with the previously described CT appearance of canine nasal tumours. Additionally, calcification patterns described as features of human nasal chondrosarcomas were also identified.

臨床意義

CT 上出現環弧型或爆米花型鈣化，應將軟骨肉瘤列為犬鼻腔破壞性腫塊的優先鑑別診斷。

英文原文｜Findings may help prioritise differential lists of destructive nasal masses seen on CT in dogs.

🗃️ 結構化重點

研究族群

11 例活組織切片確診之犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤。族群組成：混種犬（大型）4 隻、混種犬（小型）2 隻、拉布拉多 1 隻、拳師犬 1 隻、德國牧羊犬 1 隻、柯基犬 1 隻、西施犬 1 隻。中位年齡 10 歲（範圍 4–13 歲），中位體重 24 kg（範圍 6.5–45 kg）。絕育母犬 5 隻、去勢公犬 5 隻、未絕育公犬 1 隻。平均症狀持續 5.5 週（範圍 1–12 週），最常見症狀為鼻鼾聲、鼻液（含鼻出血）及打噴嚏。無犬出現神經症狀。所有犬均接受胸部 X 光及腹部超音波。1 例胸部 X 光疑似多發肺結節（轉移性腫瘤 vs. 肉芽腫性疾病）；腹部超音波全部無顯著異常。

英文原文｜The study population consisted of four mixed breed dogs over 20 kg, two small mixed breed dogs less than 20 kg, one Labrador retriever, one boxer, one German shepherd dog, one corgi and one shih-tzu. Median age was 10 years (range 4 to 13 years), median weight was 24 kg (range 6.5 to 45 kg) and there were five spayed females, five neutered males and one intact male. The mean duration of clinical signs before presentation was 5.5 weeks (range 1 to 12 weeks) with common clinical signs being stertorous breathing, nasal discharge (including epistaxis) and sneezing.

CT 掃描方案

16 切 GE Lightspeed 多偵測器 CT；全身麻醉、胸骨臥位；橫切面螺旋掃描，切片厚度 1–4 mm；軟組織及骨骼演算法雙重建；顯影劑為 iopromide（300 mg/mL）2.2 mL/kg，2 mL/s 靜脈注射。影像以 PACS 工作站（eFilm; Merge Healthcare）由 1 位放射科專科醫師及主要作者進行回溯性判讀，均未對組織病理結果盲評。

英文原文｜CT of the head was performed with a 16-slice multidetector-row scanner (GE Lightspeed; GE Medical Systems) with dogs under general anaesthesia and positioned in sternal recumbency. Precontrast and postcontrast helical transverse images were acquired with a slice thickness between 1 and 4 mm and two reconstruction algorithms in soft tissue and bone. Postcontrast series were obtained after injection of 2.2 mL/kg of intravenous iopromide (300 mg/mL) through a peripheral catheter at a rate of 2 mL/second.

CT 評估項目

依 CT-based 改良 Adams 腫瘤分期系統（Adams et al. 2008）進行分期，另評估五項附加特徵：（1）鼻腔內病灶位置；（2）顯影後均質性及 HU 值；（3）腫瘤內鈣化的有無及特徵；（4）腫瘤邊界行為與外觀；（5）下頜及咽後淋巴結外觀（大小及顯影特徵）。

英文原文｜Images were reviewed for characteristics used in the CT-based modified Adams tumour staging criteria and five additional characteristics: (1) location within the nasal cavity; (2) postcontrast homogeneity and attenuation values of the mass; (3) presence and characterisation of calcification within the tumour; (4) tumour margin behaviour and appearance and (5) appearance of mandibular and retropharyngeal lymph nodes.

鈣化型態定義

環弧型（Ring-and-arc）：具完整環形或弧形輪廓的鈣化灶，邊界清晰。爆米花型（Popcorn）：具弧形環狀輪廓的鈣化，疊加於無定形高密度鈣化背景之上。

英文原文｜"Ring-and-arc" calcification was defined as well-defined areas of calcification in the shape of full rings or arcs. "Popcorn" calcification was defined as well-defined rings and arc-shaped calcifications overlaying amorphous areas of calcification.

CT 改良 Adams 分期系統（Table 1）

期別 標準
Stage 1 局限於單側鼻腔、副鼻竇或額竇，鼻甲以外無骨骼侵犯
Stage 2 任何骨骼侵犯（超越鼻甲），但無眼眶、皮下或黏膜下腫塊
Stage 3 眼眶受侵犯，或鼻咽、皮下、黏膜下腫塊
Stage 4 腫瘤造成篩板溶骨（lysis of cribriform plate）

💊 藥物詳解

本研究無藥物治療相關描述。顯影劑：Iopromide（Ultravist/Iopromide；300 mg/mL），劑量 2.2 mL/kg，2 mL/s 靜脈注射，用於顯影後 CT 系列取得。

🖼️ 圖表解析

Table 2 — 11 例 CT 完整資料總覽

英文原文｜Summary of the CT findings in 11 chondrosarcomas including the CT-based modified Adams tumour staging system criteria and additional descriptive criteria.

表 2A — 病例基本 CT 特徵（Case 1–6）
病例 主要位置 雙側 侵犯部位 行為 邊界
1 左鼻腔 ✅ CP、RB、HP 膨脹型 部分清晰
2 左腹尾側鼻腔 ❌ CP 破壞型 邊界不清
3 左鼻腔 ✅ CP、RB、HP 膨脹型 部分清晰
4 左尾側鼻腔 ❌ — 破壞型 邊界不清
5 右鼻腔 ✅ CP、FS、RB 破壞型 部分清晰
6 右鼻腔 ✅ NB、CP、FS、RB 膨脹型 邊界清晰
表 2B — 病例基本 CT 特徵（Case 7–11）
病例 主要位置 雙側 侵犯部位 行為 邊界
7 右鼻腔 ✅ CP、RB 膨脹型 邊界清晰
8 右頭側鼻腔 ❌ HP 破壞型 部分清晰
9 右鼻腔 ✅ — 破壞型 部分清晰
10 — ✅ NB、CP、FS、RB 破壞型 部分清晰
11 左鼻腔 ✅ NB、CP、FS、RB 破壞型 部分清晰
表 2C — 顯影、礦化及分期（Case 1–6）
病例 顯影方式 礦化 Adams 期 淋巴結
1 瀰漫、不均質 🍿 爆米花型 ⬆️ Stage 4 N
2 邊緣及間隔顯影 ❌ 無 ⬆️ Stage 4 N
3 瀰漫、不均質 🍿 爆米花型 ⬆️ Stage 4 N
4 周邊及瀰漫不均質 ❌ 無 Stage 1 N
5 瀰漫、不均質 🍿 爆米花型 ⬆️ Stage 4 N
6 瀰漫、不均質 🍿 爆米花型 ⬆️ Stage 4 ⚠️ 輕度同側咽後
表 2D — 顯影、礦化及分期（Case 7–11）
病例 顯影方式 礦化 Adams 期 淋巴結
7 瀰漫、不均質 🍿 爆米花型 ⬆️ Stage 4 N
8 瀰漫、不均質 ⭕ 環弧型 Stage 3 N
9 瀰漫、不均質 ❌ 無 Stage 2 N
10 瀰漫、不均質 ⭕ 環弧型 ⬆️ Stage 4 N
11 瀰漫、不均質 🍿 爆米花型 ⬆️ Stage 4 N

💡 CP＝篩板；RB＝眼眶後空間；HP＝硬顎；FS＝額竇；NB＝鼻骨

🏥 臨床重點

背景：犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤的流行病學

鼻腔腫瘤佔犬所有腫瘤的 1–2%。約三分之一的鼻腔腫瘤為肉瘤，整體轉移率約 13.5%，低於其他鼻腔腫瘤類型。軟骨肉瘤以產生軟骨基質為特徵，是犬第二常見的原發性骨腫瘤，約 30% 發生於鼻腔。在 285 例犬鼻腔腫瘤中，12%（34/285）為軟骨肉瘤；在 86 例接受放射治療的鼻腔腫瘤中，軟骨肉瘤佔鼻腔肉瘤的 49%。

英文原文｜Nasal tumours account for 1 to 2% of reported canine neoplasms. Approximately one-third of these tumours are sarcomas, which are generally locally invasive with a relatively lower metastatic rate (13.5%) than other types of nasal tumours. Chondrosarcomas are characterised by the production of a primarily chondroid tumour matrix. It is the second most common primary bone tumour in dogs and approximately 30% of these occur in the nasal cavity.

CT 特徵與人類文獻的對照

在人類醫學中，軟骨肉瘤具有經典 CT 特徵：環弧型（rings-and-arcs）或爆米花型（popcorn）鈣化，由軟骨基質礦化所致。骨樣基質腫瘤（如骨肉瘤）的礦化型態則表現為雲狀、無定形。本研究首次在犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤中確認了上述鈣化型態。

英文原文｜Calcification patterns of chondroid matrix tumours (i.e. chondrosarcomas) are described as rings-and-arcs, popcorn, focal stippled or flocculent. The calcification patterns seen with osteoid matrix in aggressive bone tumours (i.e. osteosarcoma) are different and described as cloud-like and amorphous.

圖 1 — 環弧型鈣化

頭側（A）及尾側（B）鼻腔骨窗橫切面影像，示範「環弧型」鈣化（箭頭所示）。病灶為軟組織密度腫塊，其內可見小型、邊界清晰的環形或弧形高密度區（HU > 100）。

英文原文｜Ring-and-arc calcification was seen as small, well-defined, ring or arc-shaped areas of increased attenuation (greater than 100 HU) within the soft tissue-attenuating masses.

圖 2 — 爆米花型鈣化

尾側鼻腔（A）、頭側鼻腔（B）及額竇（C、D）骨窗橫切面影像，示範「爆米花型」鈣化：箭頭頭（arrowheads）指示無定形高密度鈣化區，箭頭（arrows）指示其上疊加的環弧形輪廓。

英文原文｜Popcorn calcification had similar, discrete areas of increased attenuation overlying or mixed with amorphous areas of increased attenuation.

圖 3 — 組織病理切片

鼻腔軟骨肉瘤的病理組織切片（HE 染色）。（A）×40：礦化灶（箭頭）周圍圍繞嵌於細胞外基質中的軟骨細胞，bar = 500 μm。（B）×100：（A）的放大區，bar = 200 μm。組織學上，腫瘤由融合的、邊界不清的非包膜性小葉組成，由單型性間葉梭狀至多角形細胞構成，包埋於細胞外基質中；基質從稀疏黏液樣到豐富軟骨樣不等；礦化灶見於軟骨分化區域。

英文原文｜Histologically, all neoplasms were definitively classified as chondrosarcoma. They consisted of coalescing, poorly demarcated, non-encapsulated lobules of monomorphic mesenchymal spindyloid to polygonal cells embedded in extracellular matrix. The matrix varied from scant and myxoid supporting cells in sheets to abundant and chondroid surrounding cells in individual lacunae. Foci of mineralisation were apparent in some areas of chondroid differentiation.

鈣化型態統計與分期關聯

8/11（73%）病例出現鈣化，多數含多種型態，依優勢型態分類。爆米花型（6/11，55%）全部為 Stage 4。環弧型（2/11，18%）為 Stage 3 或 4。在人類文獻中，邊界清晰的環弧型與腫瘤低惡性度相關；本研究因 Stage 4 病例比例偏高，此分期與鈣化型態的關聯可能反映族群偏差而非腫瘤分級。

英文原文｜In this study, ring-and-arc or popcorn calcification was found only in stage 4 and stage 3 chondrosarcomas. All six canine chondrosarcoma tumours with predominately popcorn calcification were of the highest stage: stage 4. While the large proportion of stage 4 tumours in this study may explain why the calcification patterns were more common in this stage as opposed to being related to the actual tumour grade, in humans mineralisation has been related to the tumour histologic grade rather than tumour stage.

鑑別診斷：與多小葉骨軟骨肉瘤（MLO）的區分

爆米花型鈣化在犬先前僅描述於多小葉骨軟骨肉瘤（MLO），本研究首次在鼻腔軟骨肉瘤中確認。兩者影像可能相似，但位置可協助鑑別：MLO 好發於顱骨扁骨（如額骨板），外觀呈邊界清晰的卵圓形腫塊；而鼻腔軟骨肉瘤起源於鼻腔腔內。

英文原文｜Popcorn calcification has been described as a feature of multilobular osteochondrosarcoma (MLO) in dogs but not with chondrosarcoma. While these two tumours could appear similar on imaging, location could help differentiate between a chondrosarcoma and MLO. MLOs tend to occur on flat bones of the skull and have a well-defined ovoid appearance.

環弧型鈣化的病理基礎

環弧型鈣化是軟骨性病灶的特徵性表現，源於多發玻璃軟骨小結節的軟骨內礦化（endochondral mineralisation）。在人類，此型態常被認為近似病理特徵（pathognomonic）；但也有見於成骨細胞瘤及焦磷酸鈣晶體沉積症的報告，需注意假陽性。爆米花型鈣化另可見於肺錯構瘤及乳腺纖維腺瘤。

英文原文｜Ring-and-arc calcification is characteristic of chondroid lesions and is due to endochondral mineralisation of multiple hyaline cartilage nodules. These patterns are often considered pathognomonic for chondral calcification, but there are reports of ring-and-arc calcification being attributed to osteoblastomas and calcium pyrophosphate dehydrate crystal deposition disease.

淋巴結評估

1/11（9%）輕度同側咽後淋巴結腫大；10/11 的下頜及咽後淋巴結大小與顯影均正常。所有 11 例在 CT 當時均進行下頜淋巴結細胞學，全部為陰性，無轉移證據。

英文原文｜One of 11 (9%) dogs had mild lymphadenopathy of the right retropharyngeal lymph node (ipsilateral to the tumour). None of the 11 dogs had abnormal contrast enhancement of the mandibular or retropharyngeal lymph nodes. There was no cytologic evidence of nodal metastasis identified.

鼻腔腫瘤位置的鑑別診斷框架（文獻回顧）

癌（carcinoma）傾向發生於鼻腔中至尾側；鼻腔淋巴瘤通常以腹側鼻道為中心；神經內分泌腫瘤多緊鄰篩板；癌及肉瘤均較可能造成緻密骨溶骨。

英文原文｜Carcinomas tend to occur in the mid-to-caudal nasal cavity, nasal lymphoma is often centred on the ventral nasal meatus and neuroendocrine tumours are generally adjacent to the cribriform plate. Additionally, carcinomas and sarcomas are reported to be more likely to cause lysis of dense bones.

🔬 批判性評估

研究強度：11 例全部具組織病理確診，為較可靠的金標準。首次系統性描述犬鼻腔軟骨肉瘤中環弧型及爆米花型鈣化，填補文獻空白，具有明確的臨床應用價值。

研究限制：（1）回溯性設計；（2）樣本量小（n = 11）；（3）僅 2 位判讀者且均未盲評；（4）描述性分析主觀性高；（5）僅評估鼻腔軟骨肉瘤，結論不可外推至非鼻腔部位；（6）未與其他鼻腔腫瘤類型的鈣化型態進行比較。

英文原文｜The major limitation of this study is that only nasal chondrosarcomas were evaluated. Any conclusions drawn from the calcification patterns can only be correlated to nasal chondrosarcomas. Other limitations include its retrospective nature, small sample size, inclusion of only two reviewers who were not blinded and the subjective nature of the descriptive analysis.

未解決的問題：鈣化型態在非鼻腔軟骨肉瘤中是否亦可見？鈣化型態與組織學惡性度（而非分期）的關係在犬是否成立？更大規模、盲評、多中心研究將有助於確認本研究發現。

🔗 重要參考文獻

  • Adams WM et al. (2008) CT-based modified Adams staging system for canine nasal tumours. Vet Radiol 50:330–335
  • Brodey RS et al. (1974) Canine skeletal chondrosarcoma: 35 cases. JAVMA 165:68–78
  • Burk R (1992) CT imaging of nasal disease in 100 dogs. Vet Radiol 33:177–180
  • Dernell WS et al. (2007) Tumours of the skeletal system. In: Withrow & MacEwen's Small Animal Clinical Oncology
  • Murphey MD et al. (2003) Imaging of primary chondrosarcoma: radiologic-pathologic correlation. Radiographics 23:1245–1278
  • Murphey MD et al. (1998) Enchondroma versus chondrosarcoma: differentiating features. Radiographics 18:1213–1237
  • Patnaik AK (1989) Canine sinonasal neoplasms: 285 cases. JAAHA 25:103–114
  • Patnaik AK et al. (1984) Canine sinonasal skeletal neoplasms: chondrosarcoma and osteosarcoma. Vet Pathol 21:475–482
  • Popovitch CA et al. (1994) Chondrosarcoma: 97 dogs. JAAHA 30:81–85
  • Rassekh CH et al. (1996) Chondrosarcoma of the nasal septum. Otolaryngol Head Neck Surg 115:29–37
  • Sones E et al. (2013) Survival in canine intranasal sarcomas treated with radiotherapy: 86 cases. Vet Radiol 54:194–201
  • Thrall DE et al. (1989) Radiographic vs CT findings in 31 dogs with malignant nasal cavity tumours. Vet Radiol 30:59–66

💬 筆記

  • 環弧型及爆米花型鈣化在犬鼻腔腫瘤中屬首次描述，CT 報告中遇到鼻腔破壞性腫塊時，應常規以骨窗評估鈣化型態並描述。
  • 鈣化缺乏不能排除軟骨肉瘤（本研究 27% 無鈣化）。
  • 與 MLO 的位置鑑別關鍵：鼻腔起源 vs. 顱骨扁骨卵圓形清晰腫塊。
  • 本研究族群 82%（9/11）為 Stage 4，建議 CT 報告常規提供 Adams 分期。
  • 淋巴結細胞學仍建議常規進行，即使 CT 外觀正常。

❓ 問題

  1. 犬非鼻腔部位軟骨肉瘤（如肋骨、肢骨）CT 上是否也出現環弧型或爆米花型鈣化？
  2. 鈣化型態在犬軟骨肉瘤是否與組織學惡性度（Grade I/II/III）相關，如同人類文獻所述？
  3. 本研究 Stage 4 比例偏高（82%）是否反映轉診醫院的選擇偏差？較基層機構的族群分期分布為何？
  4. 對於 Stage 4 軟骨肉瘤，放射治療的反應率與預後是否與其他鼻腔腫瘤類型有差異？
  5. 犬鼻腔淋巴瘤是否可能出現任何類型的鈣化，以干擾環弧型 / 爆米花型的特異性？
愛叮寶犬貓影像專科醫院 atinsight.vet · 小動物影像診斷專科
